title: Engine
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Engine
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the spark plugs may have been damaged during vehicle assembly.  The insulator on the spark plug could break off and come into contact with the electrode, which could impede engine performance.  If the electrode breaks in the course of a lengthy trip with high engine loads, the symptoms may not be immediately perceptible.  However, engine damage can result if the rider attempts to continue the journey.  Engine damage could result in lost propulsion which, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will replace the spark plugs.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, the spark plugs may have been damaged during vehicle assembly. If the electrode breaks in the course of a lengthy trip with high engine loads, the symptoms may not be immediately perceptible. Engine damage could result in lost propulsion which, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will replace the spark plugs.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, les bougies pourraient avoir été endommagées lors du montage du véhicule. L'isolant sur la bougie pourrait se séparer et toucher l'électrode, ce qui pourrait nuire au comportement du moteur. Si l'électrode se brise lors d'un long voyage avec des charges de moteur élevées, les symptômes peuvent ne pas être perceptibles immédiatement. Cependant, le moteur pourrait être endommagé si le conducteur tente de poursuivre son voyage. Les dommages au moteur pourraient provoquer une perte de propulsion, ce qui, de concert avec la circulation et l'état de la route, ainsi que les réactions du pilote, pourraient accroître le risque d'un accident. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront  remplacer les bougies.

title: Steering
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Steering
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the clamping blocks and top fork bridge were not manufactured according to specifications.  Consequently, the handlebars might not be held securely in position.  As a result, the handlebars may move out of their correct position when the motorcycle is being maneuvered, or when it is being ridden.  This could result in a loss of vehicle control and a crash with injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the top fork bridge and both clamping blocks.

This could result in a loss of vehicle control and a crash with injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the top fork bridge and both clamping blocks.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, les blocs de serrage et le té supérieur de la fourche n'ont pas été fabriqués conformément aux spécifications. En conséquence, les guidons pourraient ne pas être fixés solidement et les guidons pourraient se déplacer pendant qu'on manoeuvre la motocyclette ou la pilote. Cela pourrait causer une perte de contrôle du véhicule et un accident, et blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer le té supérieur de la fourche et les deux blocs de serrage.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: SUV
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, a float switch, which is attached to the brake fluid reservoir cap, could fail at high temperatures (>70 degrees Celsius) and not trigger a low fluid level warning lamp as required by CMVSS 135.  Due to tolerances within the switch's magnetic parts, in conjunction with thermal expansion of the switch's plastic parts at these temperatures, the switch may malfunction.  Correction: Dealers will replace the brake fluid reservoir cap.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles, a float switch, which is attached to the brake fluid reservoir cap, could fail at high temperatures (>70 degrees Celsius) and not trigger a low fluid level warning lamp as required by CMVSS 135.  Due to tolerances within the switch's magnetic parts, in conjunction with thermal expansion of the switch's plastic parts at these temperatures, the switch may malfunction.  Correction: Dealers will replace the brake fluid reservoir cap.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, un interrupteur à flotteur, qui est fixé au bouchon du réservoir de liquide de freinage, pourrait faire défaut à haute température (>70 ºC) et ne pas actionner un voyant d'avertissement de bas niveau de liquide comme requis par la NSVAC 135. À cause du niveau de tolérance dans les pièces magnétiques de l'interrupteur et de l'expansion thermique des pièces de plastique de l'interrupteur à ces températures, l'interrupteur pourrait faire défaut. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer le bouchon du réservoir du liquide de freinage.

title: Other
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Other
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the left-side chain tensioner has been incorrectly installed on the right side.  As a result, a hex nut, which is used to secure the chain tensioner, is improperly seated against the tensioner.  Consequently, loosening of the chain tensioner and the rear wheel axle may occur.  This could lead to a condition in which the motorcycle is unstable, increasing the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will install a new right side chain tensioner.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, the left-side chain tensioner has been incorrectly installed on the right side.  As a result, a hex nut, which is used to secure the chain tensioner, is improperly seated against the tensioner.  Consequently, loosening of the chain tensioner and the rear wheel axle may occur.  This could lead to a condition in which the motorcycle is unstable, increasing the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will install a new right side chain tensioner.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, le tendeur de chaîne de gauche a été posé par erreur du côté droit. En conséquence, un écrou hexagonal, qui sert à fixer le tendeur de chaîne, se trouve incorrectement placé contre le tendeur. Un desserrement du tendeur de chaîne et de l'essieu arrière pourrait donc se produire et faire en sorte que la motocyclette devienne instable, ce qui augmenterait les risques d'accident. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront poser un nouveau tendeur de chaîne de droite.

title: Fuel System
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Fuel System
Notification: Recalls Audit
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the fuel pump wiring harness may not have been manufactured according to specification.  As a result, the contact in the plug for the fuel pump can break, causing the pump to fail.  Should this happen, fuel delivery to the engine would cease and stalling would occur.    Engine stalling would result in lost propulsion which, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.   Correction: Dealers will replace the wiring harness.

En conséquence, le contact dans la prise de la pompe à carburant pourrait se briser, ce qui ferait en sorte que la pompe ferait défaut. Dans un tel cas, le carburant cesserait de se rendre jusqu'au moteur et celui ci calerait. Le manque de force motrice combiné, la motocyclette cesserait d'avancer, ce qui, ajouté aux conditions de circulation, aux conditions routières et à la réaction du motocycliste, pourrait augmenter les risques d'accident. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer le faisceau de câbles.

title: Electrical
body_text:
Category: SUV
System: Electrical
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: Certain 550I, 650I cabriolet, 650I coupe, and X5 vehicles equipped with a V8 engine, operated in conditions of below-freezing temperatures combined with low humidity, may suffer an electrostatic discharge at the fuel rails.  If this were to occur, the engine's Electronic Control Unit (ECU) could be affected such that engine stalling could result.  If the engine were to stall, this would result in a loss of power steering.  Loss of power steering could lead to a condition in which vehicle handling and control were impaired.  Correction: Dealers will install two additional ground cable between the fuel rails and the ground connection of the ignition coils.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: Certain 550I, 650I cabriolet, 650I coupe, and X5 vehicles equipped with a V8 engine, operated in conditions of below-freezing temperatures combined with low humidity, may suffer an electrostatic discharge at the fuel rails.  If this were to occur, the engine's Electronic Control Unit (ECU) could be affected such that engine stalling could result.  If the engine were to stall, this would result in a loss of power steering.  Loss of power steering could lead to a condition in which vehicle handling and control were impaired.  Correction: Dealers will install two additional ground cable between the fuel rails and the ground connection of the ignition coils.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Certaines BMW 550I, 650I cabriolet, 650I coupé et X5 munis d'un moteur V8 et utilisés sous le point de congélation et à un moment où le degré d'humidité est bas pourraient présenter un problème de décharge électrostatique au niveau des rampes d'alimentation en carburant. Si c'était le cas, l'unité de commande électronique du moteur pourrait être touchée de sorte que le moteur pourrait caler. Si le moteur calait, l'assistance de la direction diminuerait. Une diminution de l'assistance de la direction pourrait diminuer la manoeuvrabilité du véhicule. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront poser deux câbles de mise à terre supplémentaires entre les rampes d'alimentation en carburant et le raccord de mise à la terre des bobines d'allumage.

title: Suspension
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Suspension
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: Certain motorcycles may have been assembled using an incorrect retaining clip in the rear wheel assembly.  This circlip can rub against the spacer bushing, causing metal shavings to penetrate the wheel bearing.  Should the wheel bearing fail, it could cause the rear wheel to suddenly lock-up.  This, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash, causing personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will inspect the retaining circlip.  If the wrong circlip was installed, the spacing bushing, both wheel bearings, the circlip and both shaft sealing rings will be replaced.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: Certain motorcycles may have been assembled using an incorrect retaining clip in the rear wheel assembly.  This circlip can rub against the spacer bushing, causing metal shavings to penetrate the wheel bearing.  Should the wheel bearing fail, it could cause the rear wheel to suddenly lock-up.  This, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash, causing personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will inspect the retaining circlip.  If the wrong circlip was installed, the spacing bushing, both wheel bearings, the circlip and both shaft sealing rings will be replaced.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Certaines motocyclettes pourraient avoir été dotées d'un dispositif de retenue incorrect dans la roue arrière. Ce dispositif pourrait frotter contre la bague d'espacement, ce qui ferait en sorte que les rognures de métal pénétrent le roulement de moyeu. Si le roulement de moyeu faisait défaut, il se pourrait que la roue arrière se bloque soudainement. Cela, conjointement à l'état de la circulation et de la route, et aux réactions du conducteur, pourrait augmenter les risques d'accident avec blessures ou pertes de vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter le dispositif de retenue. Si le mauvais dispositif était posé, la bague d'espacement, les roulements de moyeu, le dispositif et les deux anneaux de scellement d'arbre devraient être remplacés.

title: Fuel System
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Fuel System
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the fuel tank breather hose may have been installed incorrectly, causing it to be pinched between the frame and other neighboring components.  In high ambient temperatures, the pressure inside the fuel tank could build-up, resulting in the bulging of the tank near the rear tire.  Severe suspension compression, with a high payload, can cause the bottom of the tank to rub against the rear wheel, potentially resulting in a fuel leak.  Fuel leakage, in the presence of an ignition source, could result in a fire.  Also, the rear wheel could lose traction as a result of fuel spillage, which could cause a vehicle crash with personal injuries or death.  Correction: Dealers will reroute the fuel breather.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, the fuel tank breather hose may have been installed incorrectly, causing it to be pinched between the frame and other neighboring components.  In high ambient temperatures, the pressure inside the fuel tank could build-up, resulting in the bulging of the tank near the rear tire.  Severe suspension compression, with a high payload, can cause the bottom of the tank to rub against the rear wheel, potentially resulting in a fuel leak.  Fuel leakage, in the presence of an ignition source, could result in a fire.  Also, the rear wheel could lose traction as a result of fuel spillage, which could cause a vehicle crash with personal injuries or death.  Correction: Dealers will reroute the fuel breather.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, il se pourrait que le tuyau du reniflard du réservoir de carburant ait été posé de façon incorrecte et soit pincé entre le châssis et d'autres pièces avoisinantes. Lorsque la température ambiante est élevée, la pression à l'intérieur du réservoir de carburant pourrait augmenter, ce qui produirait un gonflement du réservoir près du pneu arrière. Une compression importante de la suspension, lorsque la charge utile est élevée, pourrait faire en sorte que le bas du réservoir frotte contre la roue arrière, ce qui pourrait causer une fuite de carburant. En présence d'une source d'inflammation, une fuite de carburant pourrait causer un incendie. De plus, la roue arrière pourrait perdre son adhérence suite à un déversement de carburant, ce qui pourrait causer un accident avec blessés ou pertes de vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront réacheminer le reniflard du réservoir de carburant.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, vibrations that occur when underway could cause the front brake lines to suffer damage and develop a leak.  Brake fluid leakage could ultimately result in loss of front braking capability which, depending on traffic conditions and the rider's reactions, could result in a crash causing personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front brake lines.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, vibrations that occur when underway could cause the front brake lines to suffer damage and develop a leak. Correction: Dealers will replace the front brake lines.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, des vibrations qui se produisent lorsque le véhicule roule pourraient faire en sorte que les canalisations de freinage avant soient endommagées et se mettent à fuir. Une fuite de liquide de freinage pourrait finir par causer la perte des freins avant, et cela, dépendant de l'état de la circulation et de la réaction du conducteur, pourrait causer un accident, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer les canalisations de freinage avant.

title: Steering
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Steering
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, it is possible for the coating to separate from the inside face of the steering damper housing.  If this happens, the coating could partially clog the oil bores within the damper. Should this occur, the steering damper could become stiff, making it difficult to steer, and therefore could result in a vehicle crash causing personal injuries or death. Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the steering damper.

raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, il est possible que le revêtement se détache de la surface intérieure du réservoir d'amortisseur de direction. Si cela se produisait, le revêtement pourrait boucher partiellement les orifices pour l'huile dans l'amortisseur. L'amortisseur de direction pourrait alors se raidir, ce qui rendrait la direction difficile à manoeuvrer et, donc, pourrait causer un accident, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et, le cas échéant, remplacer l'amortisseur de direction.

title: Seats And Restraints
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Seats And Restraints
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, the front passenger seat occupant detection mat can fatigue during field usage depending on the seat configuration, vehicle geometry, manner and frequency of front passenger entry/exit.  Over time micro cracks could develop in the side flanks of the mat, which could lead to a break of the conductive path and the system will recognize a failure and with exception of head protection system the front passenger air bag will be deactivated.  The airbag On/Off lamp will be illuminated to make the occupants aware of the deactivation.   Correction: The occupant detection mat will be granted a warranty extension of 10 years.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles, the front passenger seat occupant detection mat can fatigue during field usage depending on the seat configuration, vehicle geometry, manner and frequency of front passenger entry/exit.  Over time micro cracks could develop in the side flanks of the mat, which could lead to a break of the conductive path and the system will recognize a failure and with exception of head protection system the front passenger air bag will be deactivated.  The airbag On/Off lamp will be illuminated to make the occupants aware of the deactivation.   Correction: The occupant detection mat will be granted a warranty extension of 10 years.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, le système de détection d'occupant de siège de passager avant pourrait se fatiguer à l'usage en fonction de la configuration de siège, de la géométrie du véhicule, de la façon dont monte/descend le passager avant, et de la fréquence à laquelle il le fait. À la longue, des micro fissures pourraient se former dans les flancs latéraux du système, ce qui pourrait couper le trajet conducteur; de plus, le système détectera une défaillance et, outre le système de protection de la tête, le coussin gonflable de passager avant sera mis hors service. Le voyant ON/OFF de coussin gonflable s'allumera afin d'avertir les occupants que le coussin gonfable est hors service. Correction : On accordera un prolongement de garantie de 10 ans sur le tapis du système de détection d'occupant .

title: Tires
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Tires
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain M3 vehicles, the tires may have been damaged during transportation from port to dealerships.  The transit of vehicles at very low temperature may have caused cracking of the treads.  If the treads have experienced cracking, the tire may fail at high speed and could result in a crash causing injuries or death.  Correction: Dealers will inspect the affected tires and replace them as necessary.

Correction: Dealers will inspect the affected tires and replace them as necessary.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines BMW M3, les pneus pourraient avoir été endommagés lors de leur transport entre le port et les concessionnaires. Le déplacement des véhicules à très basse température pourrait avoir provoqué des fissures dans les bandes de roulement. Si les bandes de roulement sont fissurées, les pneus pourraient faire défaut à haute vitesse et cela pourrait causer un accident, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vie. Correction :  Les concessionnaires devront inspecter les pneus visés et les remplacer le cas échéant.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: Certain vehicles were fitted with brake discs  for 16 inch wheels rather than 17 inch wheels.  The smaller diameter discs could be exposed to higher thermal loads during braking.  If this occurred during conditions of intense brake usage, then braking performance would be reduced.  Even though sufficient braking capability would be maintained to slow and stop the vehicle, the risk of a crash still exists.  Correction:  Dealers will inspect brake discs & brake pads and replace them if necessary.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: Certain vehicles were fitted with brake discs  for 16 inch wheels rather than 17 inch wheels.  The smaller diameter discs could be exposed to higher thermal loads during braking.  If this occurred during conditions of intense brake usage, then braking performance would be reduced.  Even though sufficient braking capability would be maintained to slow and stop the vehicle, the risk of a crash still exists.  Correction:  Dealers will inspect brake discs & brake pads and replace them if necessary.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Certains véhicules ont été munis de disques de frein pour roues de 16 po plutôt que pour roues de 17 po. Les disques de plus petit diamètre pourraient être exposés à des charges thermiques plus élevées au cours du freinage. Si cela se produisait lors d'une utilisation intense des freins, le rendement des freins serait alors réduit. Même si une capacité de freinage suffisante était maintenue pour ralentir et arrêter le véhicule, le risque d'accident existe encore. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter les disques de frein et les plaquettes de frein et les remplacer le cas échéant.

title: Suspension
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Suspension
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, due to build tolerances and the length of front threaded fastener used on the Paralever link, there is a possibility that the fastener may come loose due to insufficient torque and over time separate from its housing.  This situation could compromise the handling of the motorcycle which could result in a crash causing property damages, personal injuries or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the existing fastener with an improved version.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, due to build tolerances and the length of front threaded fastener used on the Paralever link, there is a possibility that the fastener may come loose due to insufficient torque and over time separate from its housing.  This situation could compromise the handling of the motorcycle which could result in a crash causing property damages, personal injuries or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the existing fastener with an improved version.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, à cause de tolérances de construction et de la longueur du dispositif de fixation fileté avant de la bielle " Paralever ", il est possible que le dispositif de fixation se desserre à cause d'un couple de serrage insuffisant et qu'il finisse par se détacher de son carter. Cette situation pourrait compromettre le comportement de la motocyclette, ce qui pourrait causer un accident, endommager des biens matériels, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer le dispositif de fixation existant par un dispositif de fixation amélioré.

title: Powertrain
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Powertrain
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain M3 vehicles equipped with the multistage downshifting of the double clutch gearbox, during some cases involving rapid vehicle deceleration, the transmission software may perform a multistage downshift.  In this situation the clutch is open for a approximately 200msec.  When this occurs, positive gear engagement is interrupted.  In conjunction with the engine's over run fuel cut-off at low speed, there is a possibility for the engine to stall.  Loss of propulsion, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the driver's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction:  Dealers will re-program the Engine Electronic Control Module.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain M3 vehicles equipped with the multistage downshifting of the double clutch gearbox, during some cases involving rapid vehicle deceleration, the transmission software may perform a multistage downshift.  In this situation the clutch is open for a approximately 200msec.  When this occurs, positive gear engagement is interrupted.  In conjunction with the engine's over run fuel cut-off at low speed, there is a possibility for the engine to stall.  Loss of propulsion, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the driver's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction:  Dealers will re-program the Engine Electronic Control Module.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines BMW M3 munis de la fonction de rétrogradation polyétagée de la boîte de vitesses à double embrayage, dans certains cas de décélération rapide du véhicule, le logiciel de la boîte de vitesses pourrait effectuer une rétrogradation polyétagée. Dans une telle situation, l'embrayage est ouvert pendant environ 200 millièmes de seconde. Lorsque cela se produit, l'engrenage est interrompu. En conjonction avec le système de coupure de l'alimentation en carburant en cas de survitesse du moteur lorsque le véhicule roule lentement, il y a une possibilité que le moteur cale. Une perte de propulsion, ajouté à l'état de la circulation et de la route, et aux réactions du conducteur, pourrait augmenter les risques d'accident. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront reprogrammer le module de commande électronique du moteur.

title: Lights And Instruments
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Lights And Instruments
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: Certain motorcycles fail to comply with the requirements of CMVSS 108 - Lamps, Reflective Devices and Associated Equipment.  The front turn signals were installed in an improper location.  As a result, the rider's intentions to turn may not be conveyed clearly to other road users, increasing the risk of a crash causing injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the turn signal base.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: Certain motorcycles fail to comply with the requirements of CMVSS 108 - Lamps, Reflective Devices and Associated Equipment. Correction: Dealers will replace the turn signal base.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Certaines motocyclettes ne satisfont pas aux exigences de la NSVAC 108 – feux, dispositifs réfléchissants et matériel connexe. Les clignotants avant ont été posés à un endroit inadéquat. En conséquence, l’intention du motocycliste de tourner pourrait ne pas être communiquée clairement aux autres usagers de la route, ce qui augmenterait les risques d’accident avec blessés ou pertes de vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer la base des clignotants.

metadata_json.body_fr:
Système: Feux et instruments
Notification: Sécurité - fabricant
Commentaire: Certaines motocyclettes ne satisfont pas aux exigences de la NSVAC 108 – feux, dispositifs réfléchissants et matériel connexe. Les clignotants avant ont été posés à un endroit inadéquat. En conséquence, l’intention du motocycliste de tourner pourrait ne pas être communiquée clairement aux autres usagers de la route, ce qui augmenterait les risques d’accident avec blessés ou pertes de vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer la base des clignotants.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the front brake disc fasteners installed during vehicle assembly may have been of insufficient length.  As a result, the fasteners may not have received adequate tightening torque, which could eventually allow the brake disc to loosen.  This could result in a loss of front brake function which, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front brake disc fasteners.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, the front brake disc fasteners installed during vehicle assembly may have been of insufficient length.  As a result, the fasteners may not have received adequate tightening torque, which could eventually allow the brake disc to loosen.  This could result in a loss of front brake function which, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front brake disc fasteners.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, les dispositifs de fixation du disque de frein avant posés pendant le montage du véhicule pourraient ne pas être assez longs. En conséquence, les dispositifs de fixation pourraient ne pas avoir été assez serrés, ce qui pourrait permettre au disque de frein de se desserrer. Cela pourrait faire en sorte que les freins avant cessent de fonctionner, ce qui, conjointement à l'état de la route, à l'intensité de la circulation et aux réactions du conducteur, pourrait augmenter les risques d'accident. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer les dispositifs de fixation de disque de frein avant.

body_text:

Lost propulsion, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will tighten the sprocket fasteners to specs.

title: Other
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Other
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, the centrally-located tailpipe extension protrudes slightly beyond the rear bumper.  As a consequence, it is possible for inadvertent contact with a person's leg.  It the tailpipe is hot during contact, a burn could occur.  Correction: Dealers will replace the tailpipe extension with a new, shortened version.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles, the centrally-located tailpipe extension protrudes slightly beyond the rear bumper.  As a consequence, it is possible for inadvertent contact with a person's leg.  It the tailpipe is hot during contact, a burn could occur.  Correction: Dealers will replace the tailpipe extension with a new, shortened version.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, la rallonge centrale de tuyau d'échappement dépasse légèrement le pare-chocs arrière. En conséquence, il est possible que les jambes de quelqu'un entrent en contact avec cette rallonge. Si le tuyau d'échappement était chaud au moment du contact, la personne qui y touche pourrait subir des brûlures. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer la rallonge du tuyau d'échappement par une rallonge nouvelle et raccourcie.

title: Wheels
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Wheels
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the front wheel quick-release axle may not have been manufactured to specifications.  The quick-release axle might be of reduced wall thickness which, under severe loads (off-roading, for example), could cause the axle to break.  This could result in a vehicle crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the quick-release axle.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, the front wheel quick-release axle may not have been manufactured to specifications.  The quick-release axle might be of reduced wall thickness which, under severe loads (off-roading, for example), could cause the axle to break.  This could result in a vehicle crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the quick-release axle.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, l'essieu avant à détachement rapide pourrait ne pas avoir été fabriqué conformément aux spécifications. L'épaisseur de la paroi de l'essieu à détachement rapide pourrait être réduite, ce qui, dans une situation où les contraintes sont élevées (la circulation hors-route, par exemple), pourrait briser l'essieu. Cela pourrait provoquer un accident, endommager des biens matériels, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer l'essieu à détachement rapide.

metadata_json.body_fr:
Système: Roues

L'épaisseur de la paroi de l'essieu à détachement rapide pourrait être réduite, ce qui, dans une situation où les contraintes sont élevées (la circulation hors-route, par exemple), pourrait briser l'essieu. Cela pourrait provoquer un accident, endommager des biens matériels, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer l'essieu à détachement rapide.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, vibration, particularly on a long ride at constant high engine rpm and on engine overrun at high rpm, can, under certain circumstances, cause foaming of the brake fluid in the reservoir of the front brakes.  This foaming may cause air to enter into the brake system, which can severely diminish the braking efficiency of the front brakes.  Extended stopping distances may result in a vehicle crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will install a screen insert into the front brake fluid reservoir.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, vibration, particularly on a long ride at constant high engine rpm and on engine overrun at high rpm, can, under certain circumstances, cause foaming of the brake fluid in the reservoir of the front brakes.  This foaming may cause air to enter into the brake system, which can severely diminish the braking efficiency of the front brakes.  Extended stopping distances may result in a vehicle crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will install a screen insert into the front brake fluid reservoir.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, des vibrations, particulièrement lors d'une longue promenade où le régime du moteur est élevé et constant et en régime de décélération à régime élevé, peuvent, dans certaines circonstances, provoquer la formation de mousse dans le liquide de freinage du réservoir des freins avant. Cette formation de mousse pourrait provoquer l'entrée d'air dans le circuit de freinage, ce qui pourrait diminuer grandement l'efficacité des freins avant. Des distances de freinage plus grandes pourraient causer un accident, endommager des biens matériels, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront poser une crépine dans le réservoir de liquide de freinage avant.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: SUV
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, the rear brake discs may not have been manufactured according to specifications.  As a result, a reduction in braking performance at the affected rear wheel could occur.  In an extreme case, the affected rear brake disc could break resulting in a loss of braking at the wheel.  Extended stopping distances may result in a vehicle crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the rear brake discs.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles, the rear brake discs may not have been manufactured according to specifications. Extended stopping distances may result in a vehicle crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the rear brake discs.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, les disques des freins arrière pourraient ne pas avoir été fabriqués conformément aux spécifications. En conséquence, il pourrait y avoir une diminution du rendement du freinage au niveau de la roue arrière visée. Dans un cas extrême, le disque du frein arrière visé pourrait se briser et causer une perte de freinage. Des distances de freinage plus grandes pourraient causer un accident, endommager des biens matériels, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et, le cas échéant, remplacer les disques des freins arrière.

title: Airbag
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Airbag
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, incorrect crimp connectors may have been used during vehicle assembly on the side airbag and belt tensioner wiring.  As a result, sufficient contact between the crimp connectors and the corresponding plug may not occur.  As such, the airbag and/or seatbelt tensioner may not deploy during a vehicle crash where deployment would be warranted, which could increase the risk of personal injury or death to front seat occupants.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, repair the wiring harness for the front side airbags and seatbelt tensioners.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles, incorrect crimp connectors may have been used during vehicle assembly on the side airbag and belt tensioner wiring.  As a result, sufficient contact between the crimp connectors and the corresponding plug may not occur.  As such, the airbag and/or seatbelt tensioner may not deploy during a vehicle crash where deployment would be warranted, which could increase the risk of personal injury or death to front seat occupants.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, repair the wiring harness for the front side airbags and seatbelt tensioners.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, des raccords à sertir incorrects pourraient avoir été utilisés lors du montage du véhicule sur les câbles de coussin gonflable latéral et de tendeur de ceinture de sécurité. En conséquence, il pourrait ne pas y avoir un contact assez important entre les raccords à sertir et le bouchon correspondant. En soi, le coussin gonflable ou le tendeur de ceinture de sécurité pourrait ne pas se déployer au cours d'un accident où le déploiement devrait se faire, ce qui pourrait augmenter les risques de blessures ou de décès pour les occupants des sièges avant. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et, le cas échéant, réparer le faisceau de câbles des tendeurs de ceinture de sécurité et des coussins gonflables latéraux avant.

title: Fuel System
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Fuel System
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the fuel pump control unit may be subject to water intrusion which, in time, will cause it to fail.  Engine stalling would result in lost propulsion which, in conjunction with traffic and road conditions, and the rider's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the fuel pump control unit.

Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the fuel pump control unit.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, l'unité de commande de la pompe à carburant pourrait être soumise à une infiltration d'eau qui, à la longue, en causerait la défaillance. Si le moteur calait, cela entraînerait une perte de propulsion qui, conjointement à la densité de la circulation, à l'état de la route et aux réactions du conducteur, pourrait augmenter les risques d'accident. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et, le cas échéant, remplacer l'unité de commande de la pompe à carburant.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, vibrations that occur while riding could cause the front brake lines to develop leaks, allowing brake fluid to escape.  Brake fluid leakage could eventually result in a loss of front braking capability, which could cause a vehicle crash with personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front brake hoses with updated versions.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, vibrations that occur while riding could cause the front brake lines to develop leaks, allowing brake fluid to escape.  Brake fluid leakage could eventually result in a loss of front braking capability, which could cause a vehicle crash with personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front brake hoses with updated versions.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, les vibrations qui se produisent pendant que le véhicule roule pourraient faire en sorte que les canalisations des freins avant se mettent à fuir. Une fuite de liquide de freinage pourrait causer une perte de la capacité de freinage des freins avant, ce qui pourrait provoquer un accident avec blessés ou pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer les canalsiaitons des freins avant par des canalisations à jour.

metadata_json.body_fr:
Système: Freins

Une fuite de liquide de freinage pourrait causer une perte de la capacité de freinage des freins avant, ce qui pourrait provoquer un accident avec blessés ou pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer les canalsiaitons des freins avant par des canalisations à jour.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, high generator speeds combined with large demands for electrical current could cause spurious signals to emerge within the electrical system.  This could affect the pressure sensor signals of the Anti-lock Brake System (ABS) control unit, which in turn could cause the ABS to switch off.  The telltale light in the instrument panel would illuminate to notify that the ABS function is not available.  Correction: Dealers will install a capacitor meant to block interfering electrical signals.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, high generator speeds combined with large demands for electrical current could cause spurious signals to emerge within the electrical system.  This could affect the pressure sensor signals of the Anti-lock Brake System (ABS) control unit, which in turn could cause the ABS to switch off.  The telltale light in the instrument panel would illuminate to notify that the ABS function is not available.  Correction: Dealers will install a capacitor meant to block interfering electrical signals.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocylettes, un alternateur qui tourne rapidement combiné à une forte demande d'électricité pourrait produire des signaux parasites dans le circuit électrique. Cela pourrait avoir une incidence sur les signaux de capteur de pression de l'unité de commande des freins antiblocage, ce qui pourrait faire en sorte que les freins antiblocage se mettent hors-circuit. Le voyant du tableau de bord s'allumerait pour avertir le pilote que le système antiblocage des freins ne fonctionne pas. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront poser un condensateur afin de bloquer les signaux électriques parasites.

Comment: On certain vehicles, windshield bonding may be insufficient and, in case of a vehicle rollover, this could adversely affect the rigidity of the vehicle bodyshell structure, which could result in personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will remove and refit the windshield.

title: Label
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Label
Notification: Compliance Mfr
Comment: Certain vehicles are equipped with a tire information label that does not conform to the Canada Motor Vehicle Safety Standard.  It is indicating that the vehicle's seating capacity is five (5) passengers but the actual seating capacity is only for four (4) passengers. However the tire size, tire pressure and vehicles capacity weight on label are correct.  Correction: New labels will be applied/provided.

Correction : De nouvelles étiquettes devront être posées/fournies.

title: Electrical
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Electrical
Notification: Recalls Audit
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the switches on the handlebars for both the direction indicator and the emergency engine-off-start functions may fail.  If this happens, the directional indicator and/or the emergency engine-off-start functions may not work properly.  Improper function of the direction indicators or sudden engine stalling may create the risk of a vehicle crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the handlebar switches.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, the switches on the handlebars for both the direction indicator and the emergency engine-off-start functions may fail. Improper function of the direction indicators or sudden engine stalling may create the risk of a vehicle crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the handlebar switches.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, les interrupteurs des deux clignotants et du système d’arrêt d’urgence sur les poignées pourraient devenir défectueux et entraîner une mauvaise indication des virages ou une panne de moteur soudaine pouvant accroître les risques d’accident causant des dommages matériels, des blessures ou des décès. Mesure corrective : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et, le cas échéant, remplacer les interrupteurs du guidon.

Système: Circuit électrique
Notification: Rappels - audit
Commentaire: Sur certaines motocyclettes, les interrupteurs des deux clignotants et du système d’arrêt d’urgence sur les poignées pourraient devenir défectueux et entraîner une mauvaise indication des virages ou une panne de moteur soudaine pouvant accroître les risques d’accident causant des dommages matériels, des blessures ou des décès. Mesure corrective : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et, le cas échéant, remplacer les interrupteurs du guidon.

title: Lights And Instruments
body_text:
Category: SUV
System: Lights And Instruments
Notification: Compliance Mfr
Comment: On certain X5 M vehicles, the front side marker lamps are not illuminated as required by the Canada Motor Vehicle Safety Standard 108 - Lighting System and Retroreflective Devices.  These vehicles were equipped with front side marker lamps, but not with the power supply cables leading to the lamps.  As a result, the front side marker lamps do not illuminate.  Reduced visibility increases the risk of crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will install power supply cables for the front side marker lamps.

title: Powertrain
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Powertrain
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: Certain motorcycles, may have a defective chain and sprocket set.  The problems are due to fluctuations in the manufacturing process of the drive chains.  If the drive chain snaps the drive fails, which can lead to safety-critical riding situations.  Under worst-case conditions the rear wheel might lock up if the drive chain snaps and becomes trapped between the wheel and the frame.  This could lead to a loss of vehicle control and result in a crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the chain and sprocket set.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: Certain motorcycles, may have a defective chain and sprocket set.  The problems are due to fluctuations in the manufacturing process of the drive chains.  If the drive chain snaps the drive fails, which can lead to safety-critical riding situations.  Under worst-case conditions the rear wheel might lock up if the drive chain snaps and becomes trapped between the wheel and the frame.  This could lead to a loss of vehicle control and result in a crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the chain and sprocket set.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Certaines motocyclettes pourraient comporter un ensemble chaîne-pignon défectueux. Les problèmes sont causés par des fluctuations dans le processus de fabrication des chaînes d'entraînement. Si la chaîne d'entraînement se brisait, le véhicule cesserait d'avancer, et cela pourrait mener à des situations dangereuses. Dans le pire des cas, la roue arrière pourrait se bloquer si la chaîne d'entraînement se cassait et se coincait entre la roue et le châssis. Cette situation pourrait entraîner une perte de contrôle et causer un accident, endommager des biens matériels, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer l'ensemble chaîne-pignon.

title: Seats And Restraints
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Seats And Restraints
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, the sound insulation in the "B" pillar (around the seatbelt pre-tensioner) may ignite during a crash severe enough to deploy the pre-tensioner.  This could result in additional property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front upper seatbelt and repair the "B" pillar sound insulation on both driver and passenger sides.

raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, si le limitateur de charge et le prétendeur de ceinture de sécurité avant se déployaient lors d'un accident, le matériel d'insonorisation dans le montant du milieu autour du prétendeur pourrait s'enflammer et causer d'autres dommages matériels, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer la ceinture de sécurité supérieure avant et réparer les matériaux insonorisants du montant milieu du côté du passager et du côté du conducteur.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the front brake lines (due to its current routing) may be under strain.  The vibrations that occur when the motorcycle is being ridden could cause the brake lines to develop leaks, allowing brake fluid to escape and cause the level of fluid in the reservoir of the front brake system to drop.  Brake fluid leakage could result in loss of front braking capability, which could lead to a crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front brake lines.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, the front brake lines (due to its current routing) may be under strain.  The vibrations that occur when the motorcycle is being ridden could cause the brake lines to develop leaks, allowing brake fluid to escape and cause the level of fluid in the reservoir of the front brake system to drop.  Brake fluid leakage could result in loss of front braking capability, which could lead to a crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front brake lines.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, à cause de leur acheminement actuel, les canalisations de freinage avant pourraient être sous contrainte. Les vibrations qui se produisent lorsque la motocyclette roule pourraient faire en sorte que les canalisations de freinage se mettent à fuir, ce qui permettrait au liquide de freinage de s'échapper et ferait chuter le niveau de liquide dans le réservoir du circuit de freinage avant. Une fuite de liquide de freinage pourrait causer une perte de la capacité de freinage à l'avant du véhicule, ce qui pourrait causer un accident, endommager des biens matériels, blesser quelqu'un ou entraîner des pertes de vies. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer les canalisations de freinage avant.

title: Other
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Other
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the fuel tank mounting fasteners can work loose, allowing the bolts to slip toward the inboard side and contact the fork leg if the handlebar is turned a significant amount.  This could limit handlebar travel range, affecting handling and maneuverability of the motorcycle, which could increase the risk of a crash causing property damage, personal injury or death.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and tighten the fuel tank mounting bolts as per specifications.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, the fuel tank mounting fasteners can work loose, allowing the bolts to slip toward the inboard side and contact the fork leg if the handlebar is turned a significant amount. raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, les écrous des boulons de fixation avant du réservoir de carburant peuvent se desserrer, ce qui laisse les boulons glisser vers le côté intérieur et venir en contact avec la jambe de fourche si le guidon est assez tourné. Cette situation pourrait limiter la plage de déplacement du guidon, affecter le comportement routier, la maniabilité de la motocyclette, et augmenter le risque de collision causant des dommages aux biens matériels, des blessures corporelles ou entraîner des pertes de vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et serrer les boulons de fixation du réservoir à carburant conformément aux spécifications.

title: Powertrain
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Powertrain
Notification: Recalls Audit
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the chain roll pin roller (between the fuel tank and the top chain run) could break.  If fragments become lodged between the chain and pinion, it could cause the rear wheel to lock, which could result in a crash.  Correction: Dealers will replace the bracket of the top chain take-up roller.

Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer le support du tendeur de chaîne du haut.

title: Fuel System
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Fuel System
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, the sender unit within the fuel tank could become stuck, causing the fuel gauge to display a greater quantity of fuel than that which is actually remaining in the tank.  As a result, if the tank were to become empty, engine stalling could occur which, in conjunction with traffic, road conditions, and driver's reactions, could increases the risk of a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the fuel level sender with a revised version.

Correction: Dealers will replace the fuel level sender with a revised version.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, un défaut du transmetteur qui se trouve dans le réservoir de carburant pourrait faire en sorte que la jauge à carburant indique un niveau de carburant plus élevé qu'en réalité. En conséquence, le réservoir pourrait se vider et le moteur caler, ce qui augmente les risques qu'il y ait un accident, que des biens matériels soient endommagés, que quelqu'un soit blessé ou perde la vie. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer le capteur du niveau du carburant par un capteur d’une version révisée.

title: Other
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Other
Notification: Safety TC
Comment: On certain motorcycles, if the hand protector is twisted out of position relative to the handlebar lever, to the extent that lever and protector come into contact, there is a possibility that the handlebar lever remain continuously in the partly operated position.  This is turn can cause problems with the brake function and could increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Owners will receive a loose-leaf insert as an addendum to the Rider's Manual and two stickers complete with the installation instructions, or owners may have their authorised BMW motorcycle dealers do the installations for them.

raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, si la position du protecteur pour la main était modifiée par rapport au levier du guidon au point que le levier et le protecteur se touchent, il se pourrait que le levier du guidon demeure partiellement enfoncé, ce qui pourrait causer des problèmes de frein et augmenter les risques d'accident. Correction : Les propriétaires recevront un encart pour le guide du propriétaire, ainsi que deux autocollants avec les instructions de pose; les propriétaires pourraient demander à leur concessionnaire moto BMW autorisé de poser les autocollants.

title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Brakes
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, a check valve in the brake vacuum pump may leak a small amount of lubricating oil.  Over time, this could result in contamination of the brake booster.  Loss of brake power assist could occur which, in conjunction with traffic, road conditions, and driver's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the brake booster and master cylinder.  Additionally, the brake vacuum line (including the check valve) will be replaced to eliminate the possibility of oil reaching the brake booster.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles, a check valve in the brake vacuum pump may leak a small amount of lubricating oil.  Over time, this could result in contamination of the brake booster.  Loss of brake power assist could occur which, in conjunction with traffic, road conditions, and driver's reactions, could increase the risk of a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, if necessary, replace the brake booster and master cylinder.  Additionally, the brake vacuum line (including the check valve) will be replaced to eliminate the possibility of oil reaching the brake booster.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, un clapet de non-retour dans la pompe à vide du circuit de freinage pourrait laisser fuir une petite quantité d'huile de graissage. À la longue, cela pourrait contaminer le servofrein. Dans les cas extrêmes, une perte de l'assistance au freinage pourrait se produire, ce qui, en conjonction avec la circulation, les conditions routières et les réactions du conducteur, augmente les risques d'accident pouvant endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu'un. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et, si nécessaire, remplacer le servo frein et le maître cylindre. De plus, la conduite à dépression des freins (y compris le clapet de non retour) devra être remplacée pour éliminer les risques que de l'huile se rende jusqu'au servo frein.

title: Fuel System
body_text:
Category: SUV
System: Fuel System
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, due to a manufacturing process fault, the fuel pump was not produced to specifications.  As a result, under specific vehicle operating conditions, the fuel pump's commutator could experience an increase in wear which could lead to a malfunction of the fuel pump.  Ultimately, vehicle stalling could occur, which in conjunction with traffic, road conditions, and driver's reactions, increases the risk of a vehicle crash causing property damage, or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the fuel pump.

Ultimately, vehicle stalling could occur, which in conjunction with traffic, road conditions, and driver's reactions, increases the risk of a vehicle crash causing property damage, or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the fuel pump.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, à cause d'un problème dans le processus de fabrication, la pompe à carburant n'a pas été fabriquée selon les spécifications. En conséquence, dans des conditions de fonctionnement spécifiques du véhicule, le commutateur de la pompe à carburant pourrait s'user davantage, ce qui pourrait mener à un mauvais fonctionnement de la pompe à carburant. Le moteur du véhicule pourrait caler, ce qui, conjointement à la densité de la circulation, à l'état de la route et aux réactions du conducteur, augmente les risques d'accident pouvant endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu'un. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer la pompe à carburant.

Le moteur du véhicule pourrait caler, ce qui, conjointement à la densité de la circulation, à l'état de la route et aux réactions du conducteur, augmente les risques d'accident pouvant endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu'un. title: Brakes
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Brakes
Notification: Recalls Audit
Comment: On certain motorcycles, the length of one or more of the front brake disc fasteners may be insufficient.  If the length of a fastener was insufficient, this could result in the fastener not being tightened according to specifications.  If this happened, the fastener could work loose from its threads or cause the screws to shear off and the brake disc will then rotate loosely between the hub and fork.  Failure to have the motorcycle inspected and repaired, in conjunction with traffic, road conditions, and the rider's reactions, will increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will replace the affected fasteners.

Failure to have the motorcycle inspected and repaired, in conjunction with traffic, road conditions, and the rider's reactions, will increase the risk of a crash.  Correction: Dealers will replace the affected fasteners.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, la longueur d'au moins un ou plus des dispositifs de fixation de disque de frein avant pourrait être insuffisante. Si la longueur d'un dispositif de fixation était insuffisante, le dispositif de fixation pourrait ne pas être serré conformément aux spécifications. Dans un tel cas, le dispositif de fixation pourrait se desserrer de ses filets ou faire en sorte que les vis se brisent et que le disque de frein tourne librement entre le moyeu et la fourche. Le fait de ne pas faire inspecter et réparer la motocyclette, en conjonction avec la circulation, l'état de la route et les réactions du pilote, augmentera le risque d'accident. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer les dispositifs de fixation visés.

title: Label
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Label
Notification: Inconsequential
Comment: On certain vehicles, the "B" pillar National Safety Mark label is distorted as a result of a printing error.  This situation does not pose a risk to highway safety.  Correction:  Due to the inconsequential nature of this non-compliance, no action will be taken.

title: Suspension
body_text:
Category: Motorcycle
System: Suspension
Notification: Recalls Audit
Comment: On certain motorcycles, due to environmental conditions, the bearings of the link lever attached to the rear strut could be subject to corrosion.  This could lead to reduced movement of the link lever.  Over time, if the corrosion became significant, restriction of movement of the link lever could occur.  This could affect handling of the motorcycle.  In an extreme case, this could result in the connecting rod breaking by a bending force, causing the rear wheel to decelerate by contact with the inner fender.  This could lead to a crash depending on traffic, road conditions and rider's reactions.  Correction: Dealers will replace the rear suspension relay lever.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain motorcycles, due to environmental conditions, the bearings of the link lever attached to the rear strut could be subject to corrosion.  This could lead to reduced movement of the link lever.  Over time, if the corrosion became significant, restriction of movement of the link lever could occur.  This could affect handling of the motorcycle.  In an extreme case, this could result in the connecting rod breaking by a bending force, causing the rear wheel to decelerate by contact with the inner fender.  This could lead to a crash depending on traffic, road conditions and rider's reactions.  Correction: Dealers will replace the rear suspension relay lever.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines motocyclettes, à cause des conditions environnementales, les roulements du levier de tringlerie se rattachant à la jambe de force arrière pourraient se corroder. Cela pourrait diminuer le débattement du levier de tringlerie. À la longue, si la corrosion devenait importante, le mouvement du levier de tringlerie pourrait devenir restreint. Cela pourrait avoir une incidence négative sur le comportement de la motocyclette. Dans un cas extrême, il se pourrait qu'une force de courbure brise la bielle et que la roue arrière ralentisse en touchant à l'aile intérieure. Dépendant de la circulation, de l'état de la route et des réactions du pilote, cela pourrait causer un accident. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer le levier de tringlerie de la suspension arrière.

Comment: On certain BMW X5 xDrive35d (diesel) vehicles, the engine belt tensioner may have been manufactured incorrectly and could fail.  This could cause a loss of steering power assist, which may result in a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the belt tensioner.

This would cause a loss of steering power assist, which may result in a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the Electric Power Steering unit.

title: Fuel System
body_text:
Category: SUV
System: Fuel System
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles equipped with a diesel engine, the fuel filter heater (used for warming diesel fuel during vehicle operation at low ambient air temperature) could malfunction.  This could allow permanent activation of the fuel filter heater, including activation on a parked vehicle with the ignition in the OFF position, which could drain the battery.  A discharged battery would prevent engine start-up.  In certain cases the heater unit could overheat, which could result in a vehicle fire causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the fuel filter heater assembly.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles equipped with a diesel engine, the fuel filter heater (used for warming diesel fuel during vehicle operation at low ambient air temperature) could malfunction.  This could allow permanent activation of the fuel filter heater, including activation on a parked vehicle with the ignition in the OFF position, which could drain the battery.  A discharged battery would prevent engine start-up.  In certain cases the heater unit could overheat, which could result in a vehicle fire causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the fuel filter heater assembly.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules à moteur diesel, le dispositif de chauffage du filtre à carburant (utilisé pour réchauffer le diesel lorsque le véhicule fonctionne par temps froid) pourrait mal fonctionner. Cela pourrait faire en sorte que le dispositif de chauffage soit actionné en permanence, y compris dans le cas d'un véhicule stationné dont la clé de contact est en position OFF, ce qui pourrait vider la batterie. Une batterie à plat empêcherait le démarrage du moteur. Dans certains cas, le dispositif de chauffage pourrait surchauffer, ce qui pourrait mettre le feu au véhicule, endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu'un. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer le dispositif de chauffage du filtre à carburant.

title: Lights And Instruments
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Lights And Instruments
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: Certain vehicles may experience the loss of one or more rear lamp functions (tail, brake, turn signal) on the portion of the rear lamp assemblies that are mounted in the body (the portion of the lamps mounted on the trunk are not affected).  Failure of any rear lamp function may result in the following road users being unaware of the driver's intentions, as well as reducing vehicle conspicuity during hours of darkness, which could increase the risk of a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will install an additional electrical ground connection to the rear lamp circuitry.  Rear lamp function will be checked and, if necessary, further electrical repair may be necessary, including the replacement of the 8-pin connector housing.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: Certain vehicles may experience the loss of one or more rear lamp functions (tail, brake, turn signal) on the portion of the rear lamp assemblies that are mounted in the body (the portion of the lamps mounted on the trunk are not affected).  Failure of any rear lamp function may result in the following road users being unaware of the driver's intentions, as well as reducing vehicle conspicuity during hours of darkness, which could increase the risk of a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will install an additional electrical ground connection to the rear lamp circuitry.  Rear lamp function will be checked and, if necessary, further electrical repair may be necessary, including the replacement of the 8-pin connector housing.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, il se pourrait qu'un ou plusieurs des feux arrière (feu arrière, feu de freinage, clignotant) cessent de fonctionner sur la partie des feux arrière qui sont fixés dans la carrosserie - la partie des feux fixés sur le coffre n'est pas touchée. Si l'un ou l'autre des feux arrière cessait de fonctionner, cela pourrait faire en sorte que les usagers de la route suivants ne connaissent pas les intentions du conducteur, et que le véhicule soit moins visible pendant les heures de noirceur, ce qui pourrait augmenter le risque d'un accident, endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu'un. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront poser un raccord de mise à la masse supplémentaire sur le circuit des feux arrière. Le fonctionnement des feux arrière devra être vérifié et, si nécessaire, des réparations supplémentaires au circuit électrique pourraient être nécessaires, y compris le remplacement du boîtier de raccord à 8 tiges.

title: Powertrain
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Powertrain
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain 3-series sedans equipped with xDrive (all-wheel-drive), the front driveshaft attachment bolts may not have received adequate tightening torque during vehicle assembly.  Should the fasteners loosen and fall out, the driveshaft would detach from the transfer case and/or the front differential, which could result in additional damage to the driveline, the undercarriage, and any nearby components, while the accompanying noise could startle the driver and cause a crash resulting in property damage and/or personal injury.  Due to the xDrive configuration, separation of the front driveshaft would not result in a loss of vehicle propulsion.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front driveshaft attachment bolts.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain 3-series sedans equipped with xDrive (all-wheel-drive), the front driveshaft attachment bolts may not have received adequate tightening torque during vehicle assembly.  Should the fasteners loosen and fall out, the driveshaft would detach from the transfer case and/or the front differential, which could result in additional damage to the driveline, the undercarriage, and any nearby components, while the accompanying noise could startle the driver and cause a crash resulting in property damage and/or personal injury.  Due to the xDrive configuration, separation of the front driveshaft would not result in a loss of vehicle propulsion.  Correction: Dealers will replace the front driveshaft attachment bolts.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certaines berlines de la série 3 munies du système xDrive (traction intégrale), les boulons de fixation de l'arbre de transmission avant pourraient ne pas avoir été adéquatement serrés lors du montage du véhicule. Si les dispositifs de fixation se desserraient et tombaient, l'arbre de transmission se détacherait de la boîte de transfert ou du différentiel avant, ce qui pourrait endommager davantage l'arbre de transmission, le train de roulement et toutes les pièces à proximité, alors que le bruit pourrait surprendre le conducteur et causer un accident qui pourrait endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu'un. À cause de la configuration du xDrive, un détachement de l'arbre de transmission avant n'entraînerait pas une perte de propulsion du véhicule. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer les boulons de fixation d'arbre de transmission avant.

Si les dispositifs de fixation se desserraient et tombaient, l'arbre de transmission se détacherait de la boîte de transfert ou du différentiel avant, ce qui pourrait endommager davantage l'arbre de transmission, le train de roulement et toutes les pièces à proximité, alors que le bruit pourrait surprendre le conducteur et causer un accident qui pourrait endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu'un. title: Electrical
body_text:

System: Electrical
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, the auxiliary water pump (which cools the turbocharger after the engine is turned OFF) can overheat and fail.  This could result in a vehicle fire causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will replace the auxiliary water pump.  Note: Owners are advised to park the vehicle outdoors until the remedy is applied.

Note: Owners are advised to park the vehicle outdoors until the remedy is applied.

Correction : Les concessionnaires devront remplacer la pompe à eau auxiliaire. Nota: Les propriétaires doivent stationner leur véhicule à l'extérieur jusqu'à ce que la solution au problème ait été appliquée.

title: Steering
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Steering
Notification: Safety TC
Comment: On certain vehicles, the electro-hydraulic power steering pump could fail temporarily or permanently due to problems with the electronics that control the function of the pump, a failure of the pump cooling fan, or a loss of power to the pump.  A vehicle experiencing a loss of steering power assist would revert to a manual steering mode which would require greater driver effort, especially at low vehicle speeds.  Nevertheless, a loss of steering power assist could ultimately result in a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: The electro-hydraulic power steering pump, as well as the pump cooling fan, will be subject to special extended warranty coverage of 12 years or 200,000 km from first in-service date of the vehicle.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles, the electro-hydraulic power steering pump could fail temporarily or permanently due to problems with the electronics that control the function of the pump, a failure of the pump cooling fan, or a loss of power to the pump.  A vehicle experiencing a loss of steering power assist would revert to a manual steering mode which would require greater driver effort, especially at low vehicle speeds.  Nevertheless, a loss of steering power assist could ultimately result in a crash causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: The electro-hydraulic power steering pump, as well as the pump cooling fan, will be subject to special extended warranty coverage of 12 years or 200,000 km from first in-service date of the vehicle.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, la pompe électro-hydraulique de la direction assistée pourrait faire défaut temporairement ou de façon permanente à cause de problèmes avec l'électronique qui commande la pompe, d'une défaillance du ventilateur de refroidissement de la pompe ou d'une perte de puissance au niveau de la pompe.  Un véhicule perdant l’assistance de la direction passerait en mode de direction manuelle, ce qui exigerait des efforts supplémentaires de la part du conducteur, surtout à basses vitesses.  Toutefois, une perte de la direction assistée pourrait causer un accident, endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu’un.  Correction : La pompe électro-hydraulique de la direction assistée, ainsi que le ventilateur de refroidissement de la pompe, seront couverts par une garantie prolongée spéciale de 12 ans ou 200 000 km débutant à la date de mise en service initiale du véhicule.

title: Electrical
body_text:
Category: Car
System: Electrical
Notification: Safety Mfr
Comment: On certain vehicles, the insulated bulkhead connector (used to join the two halves of the positive battery cable) may have been incorrectly installed during vehicle assembly.  Over time, the bolt connection could loosen, which would increase electrical resistance.  In addition, an incorrectly insulated bulkhead connector could allow humidity to accumulate at this location, causing current leakage.  These issues could cause the cable connection to overheat, which could result in a vehicle fire causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, as necessary, secure the insulated bulkhead connector.  In addition, protective grease will be added to the area and the plastic battery positive terminal cover will be replaced.

raw_payload.COMMENT_ETXT: On certain vehicles, the insulated bulkhead connector (used to join the two halves of the positive battery cable) may have been incorrectly installed during vehicle assembly.  Over time, the bolt connection could loosen, which would increase electrical resistance.  In addition, an incorrectly insulated bulkhead connector could allow humidity to accumulate at this location, causing current leakage.  These issues could cause the cable connection to overheat, which could result in a vehicle fire causing property damage and/or personal injury.  Correction: Dealers will inspect and, as necessary, secure the insulated bulkhead connector.  In addition, protective grease will be added to the area and the plastic battery positive terminal cover will be replaced.
raw_payload.COMMENT_FTXT: Sur certains véhicules, le raccord de cloison isolé (utilisé pour joindre les deux moitiés du câble positif de batterie) pourrait avoir été mal posé pendant le montage du véhicule. À la longue, le raccord vissé pourrait se desserrer, ce qui augmenterait la résistance électrique. De plus, si le raccord de cloison était mal isolé, l'humidité pourrait s'accumuler à cet endroit, ce qui causerait une fuite de courant. Ces problèmes pourraient causer la surchauffe du raccord, ce qui pourrait provoquer un incendie, endommager des biens matériels ou blesser quelqu'un. Correction : Les concessionnaires devront inspecter et, si nécessaire, fixer le raccord de cloison isolé. De plus, de la graisse protectrice devra être ajoutée sur la zone, et le couvre borne positive de batterie en plastique devra être remplacé.

title: Label
body_text:
Category: SUV
System: Label
Notification: Inconsequential
Comment: On certain BMW X6 M vehicles, the Tire and Loading Information label incorrectly indicates a vehicle seating capacity of four occupants.  The actual seating capacity is five.  Correction: Due to the inconsequential nature of this non-compliance, no action will be taken.

Comment: Certain vehicles fail to conform to Canada Motor Vehicle Safety Standards.  Specifically, the compliance label does not indicate the wheel rim size, as required by the Standard.  Correction: Due to the inconsequential nature of this non-compliance, no action will be taken.
